dialogueChunks.intro: They are free, {player_name}. You did it. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} safe, and {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} been driven off for good.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I saw faces I thought I would never see again walking back through our gates. {quest_focus_The} no longer holds any power over us. {quest_ally} is helping everyone settle back in.
dialogueChunks.outro: You brought our people home. That is a debt beyond measure.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, against all odds you managed to {quest_action}. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} back with us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The healers are tending to them now. It will take time, but they will recover. {quest_threat_animate_The} scattered when they saw you coming: I doubt they will try this again.
dialogueChunks.outro: You risked your life for strangers. That kind of courage is rare.

dialogueChunks.intro: Freedom. That is what you gave them, {player_name}. {quest_stakes_human_The} walked out of {quest_focus_the} alive because of you.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been broken. What was once a place of despair is now just rubble and bad memories. {quest_ally} says the rescued are already asking for you by name.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did something extraordinary today. This settlement will never forget it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the gates opened and they came pouring out. Some were crying. Some were laughing. Most were doing both.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} stands empty now: a husk that will never hold anyone captive again. {quest_ally} counted every head and confirmed that no one was left behind. {quest_threat_The} underestimated what one determined person could do.
dialogueChunks.outro: You gave them back their lives. There is no greater gift than that.

dialogueChunks.intro: I keep expecting to wake up and find this was a dream. But it is real, {player_name}. They are home.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The youngest ones do not fully understand what happened, but their parents do. {quest_ally} says the settlement has not been this united since before {quest_origin}. Suffering brought us together, and your courage brought us back.
dialogueChunks.outro: You carried the weight so others did not have to. We will remember.
